summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ParkSmart parking app - Backend APIs fully functional (10/10 tests passed), Frontend navigation and display features working. Critical issue identified with map marker clickability preventing core booking flow testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Map markers not clickable due to DOM element interception - prevents bottom sheet from opening
ui_bugs.impact: Blocks entire booking flow - users cannot select parking spots

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test slot picker, booking confirmation due to marker click issue

passed_tests: Get parking sites API - returns 100 locations with proper structure
Get parking slots API - returns slot grids with availability status
Create booking API - both 'now' and 'scheduled' bookings working
Get bookings API - retrieves history with proper status badges
ESP32 simulation API - real-time slot updates working
Frontend map loading with 100 colored markers (green/yellow/red)
My Bookings page - displays 3 bookings with correct status badges
Scheduled bookings show 'Scheduled' status in indigo color
Active bookings show 'active' status in green color
Profile page editing functionality - save/update working
Booking details display (slot numbers, prices, dates, durations)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix map marker click interception issue. Markers exist and display correctly but click events are blocked, preventing users from opening bottom sheet and accessing booking flow. This is a blocker for the core functionality of the parking app.
